name: SlimeIMU
description: High-quality IMU sensor fusion library for ESP32, extracted from SlimeVR firmware. Features VQF sensor fusion, auto-detection, calibration persistence, and support for BMI160, BMI270, ICM42688, ICM45xxx, LSM6DSx, MPU6050, BNO0xx, and more.
keywords: imu, sensor fusion, vqf, quaternion, gyroscope, accelerometer, magnetometer, bmi270, icm42688, lsm6dsv, mpu6050, bno085, esp32, motion tracking, orientation
